prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original 3.3L inline-8 (engine code: **Type 59 3.3L GP**) with a fully restored and balanced **Type 59B** block, bored to 3.5L (86mm bore x 107mm stroke) using a **Mahle Motorsport** forged piston kit (9.5:1 compression) with **DLC-coated** wrist pins and **ARP L19** rod bolts. Pair with a **Carrillo H-beam** connecting rod set (6.125" length) for 9,000 RPM reliability.

Forced Induction: Retrofit a **Garrett GT3582R** turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 58mm inducer) with a **Tial MV-R 44mm** external wastegate, plumbed into a **custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust manifold** (fabricated by **Schoenleber Engineering**) with **Inconel 625** turbine flanges. Intercooling via a **PWR** 3-core air-to-water intercooler (mounted in the original radiator bay) with a **Bosch 044** high-flow water pump and **Motec M150 ECU** managing boost via a **Pierburg 3-bar MAP sensor**. Target: 1.8 bar (26 psi) peak boost for 450+ HP at the crank (stock block limit).

Drivetrain: Replace the original 4-speed non-synchro gearbox with a **Hewland 5-speed transaxle (NDM)** modified with **Xtrac 6-speed internals** (dog-ring engagement, **AP Racing 5.5" twin-plate clutch** with **ceramic-metallic friction discs**). Final drive ratio: **3.89:1** (optimized for Le Mans-style circuits). Install a **Quaife ATB differential** with **85W-140 synthetic gear oil** and **custom billet aluminum differential housing** (machined by **HRE Performance Wheels**).
estetica: Bodywork: Replace the original aluminum panels with **carbon fiber replicas** (hand-laid by **Callaway Carbon**) in **Bugatti Blue (RAL 5017)** with **gold leaf pinstriping** (applied by **Signarama Monaco**). Front splitter: **custom 3D-printed ABS** (designed in **Siemens NX**) with **Gurney flap** and **Dzus fasteners** for quick removal. Rear wing: **1930s-style single-plane** (fabricated by **Aeroform Composites**) with **adjustable angle of attack (0-12 degrees)** via **Aeromotions hydraulic actuators**.

Wheels & Tires: **Rays Engineering Gram Lights 57DR** (17x10" front, 17x12" rear) with **custom offset (-5mm front, +15mm rear)** to clear **Brembo GT-R calipers**. Tires: **Pirelli P Zero Corsa (285/650R17 front, 325/710R17 rear)** mounted on **HRE C103** center-lock wheels (gold anodized). Valve stems: **Titanium TiAL** with **nitrogen-filled tires** (1.8 bar cold pressure).

Interior: **Full Alcantara retrim** (by **Saddleback Leather**) in **Tobacco Brown** with **period-correct Bugatti script embroidery** on the headrests. Steering wheel: **MOMO Prototipo** (380mm diameter) wrapped in **Nappa leather** with **quick-release hub (NRG Innovations)**. Gauges: **Smiths Classic** (3.5" diameter) with **LED backlighting (red)** and **custom calibration** for the **Motec C127 dash logger**. Roll cage: **T45 steel** (fabricated by **Custom Cages UK**) with **chrome-moly door bars** and **Schroth 6-point harnesses (FHR-compliant)**.
